name: Morning Reflections Ep. 85 - What Grief Teaches Us
description: A conversation about the unexpected gifts that come through loss. Featuring a reflection on Psalm 23 and how grief can open us to deeper presence. Aired live on WGSP 1490 AM, Saturday January 11, 2026.

name: Morning Reflections Ep. 86 - Sabbath in a Restless World
description: What does rest really look like when your work never stops? Rebecca talks about reclaiming Sabbath as a spiritual discipline, not a luxury. Aired WGSP 1490 AM, January 18, 2026.

name: Morning Reflections Ep. 87 - Finding God in the Ordinary
description: A full two-hour broadcast exploring how the sacred shows up in everyday moments - morning coffee, a walk, a phone call from someone you love. Aired WGSP 1490 AM, January 25, 2026.

name: Morning Reflections Ep. 88 - Love as a Practice (Valentine's Special)
description: Sandra Coles joins Rebecca for a conversation about love that endures - not the greeting-card version, but the steady, showing-up kind. Aired WGSP 1490 AM, February 15, 2026.

name: Morning Reflections Ep. 89 - Compassion Fatigue and Renewal
description: An honest conversation about what happens when caregivers run dry - and how to find the well again. Rebecca speaks from her own experience as a chaplain. Aired WGSP 1490 AM, March 1, 2026.

name: Morning Reflections Ep. 90 - New Year Sunrise Special
description: Rebecca delivers the dawn meditation from Grace Community Church before going live on WGSP. A celebration of light in the darkness and new beginnings. Aired December 6, 2025.

name: Morning Reflections Ep. 91 - Rev. Angela Dawson on Chaplaincy
description: Rev. Angela Dawson of Golden Heart Medical Center joins Rebecca to talk about what it really means to sit with people in the hardest moments. Aired WGSP 1490 AM, December 13, 2025.

name: Morning Reflections Ep. 92 - Honoring the Women of Faith: Every Kind of Mother
description: A special broadcast honoring the women of faith. Rebecca reflects on motherhood in its many forms - biological, chosen, spiritual - and the women who shaped her. Aired WGSP, December 27, 2025.

name: Morning Reflections Ep. 93 - Pastor Greer: A Conversation on Faith and Aging
description: Pastor William Greer sits down with Rebecca for a wide-ranging conversation about what 40 years of ministry has taught him about faith, doubt, and keeping your heart open. Aired WGSP, December 27, 2025.

name: Morning Reflections Ep. 94 - Joy Is Not a Luxury
description: Why joy is a spiritual discipline, not a feeling you wait for. Rebecca draws on Howard Thurman and Brené Brown, and takes live calls from listeners across Memphis. Aired WGSP, January 3, 2026.

name: Morning Reflections Ep. 95 - Seven Years on WGSP: A Radio Anniversary
description: Seven years since the first broadcast. Rebecca looks back at what she's learned, plays listener voice messages, and talks about where the show is going. Aired WGSP 1490 AM, January 10, 2026.

name: Morning Reflections Ep. 96 - Let Freedom Ring: An MLK Day Reflection
description: A special MLK Day broadcast. Rebecca reflects on liberation theology, the freedom songs of the Black church, and what the dream still asks of the living. Aired WGSP, January 17, 2026.

name: Chaplaincy 101: What We Actually Do
description: A short explainer video Rebecca made for a CPE educational session - demystifying the hospital chaplain role for nursing students, families, and the curious. Not a full broadcast; 8-minute stand-alone.

name: Grace Community Church - Community Health Fair Preview
description: A two-minute promo Rebecca produced with Deacon Mosley for the annual Grace Community Church health fair on October 3, 2026. Free screenings, resources, and community vendors. Shared to congregation Vimeo channel.

name: Morning Reflections Ep. 97 - Upcoming: When Prayer Feels Like Silence
description: Scheduled for October 10, 2026. Rebecca will explore what to do when prayer feels like talking to a wall - and why the silence might be the answer. With a live music segment featuring Lauren Daigle.

name: Faith and Presence in Clinical Settings
description: A recorded panel from the APC annual meeting on the theology of presence in ICU and palliative care settings. Features chaplains from across the region.

name: Grace Community Church - New Year Sunday Worship 2026
description: Full New Year Sunday morning service from Grace Community Church, Memphis. Sermon by Pastor William Greer. Rebecca Price delivers the opening meditation.

name: Grace Community Church - Trunk or Treat 2025 Highlights
description: Fall festival and trunk-or-treat highlights from October 2025. Emceed by Rebecca Price. Families, costumes, community.
